name: Baked Custard
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. In a bowl, lightly beat the eggs with a whisk.
3. Stir in the sugar and salt. Add the hot milk gradually, stirring constantly.
4. Add the vanilla. Strain the mixture.
5. Pour the filling into 6 custard cups or a 1-quart baking dish.
6. Set the cups or baking dish into a shallow pan at least 2 inches deep.
7. Sprinkle the custards with nutmeg.
8. Pour 1 inch of hot water around the custard cups or baking dish.
9. Bake individual custards for 45 to 50 minutes; bake the large baking dish for 1 to 1 1/4 hours.
10. The custard is done when a knife inserted 1 inch from the outer edge comes out clean. The center will still be soft.
11. Remove the custards from the hot water and place them in 1 inch of cool water to stop the cooking process.
12. Serve chilled or at room temperature. Custard is delicious served with maple syrup or fresh fruit.
YIELD: 6 servings
